Tip of the day
If there's maintenance, don't worry, usually your steps will still count during the downtime. Check the Discord announcements to be sure!

Iron chef's hat
(Eternal)
Quality:
Type: Crafted
Slot: Head
Value: 524
Search
Keyword: 		Cooking
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

This hat is stronger and heavier than before, but now you can cook themed food on a higher level.

The Iron chef's hat item is a crafted item.

Requirement

  • At least Cooking lvl. 58.

Attributes

Quality Attributes

+5% Work efficiency While doing Cooking.
+2% Double action While doing Cooking.
+7% Bonus experience While doing Cooking.
+2 Steps required While doing Cooking.

+7% Work efficiency While doing Cooking.
+3% Double action While doing Cooking.
+8% Bonus experience While doing Cooking.
+1 Steps required While doing Cooking.

+9% Work efficiency While doing Cooking.
+4% Double action While doing Cooking.
+9% Bonus experience While doing Cooking.
+1 Steps required While doing Cooking.

+11% Work efficiency While doing Cooking.
+5% Double action While doing Cooking.
+10% Bonus experience While doing Cooking.
+0 Steps required While doing Cooking.

+13% Work efficiency While doing Cooking.
+6% Double action While doing Cooking.
+12% Bonus experience While doing Cooking.
+0 Steps required While doing Cooking.

+15% Work efficiency While doing Cooking.
+7% Double action While doing Cooking.
+15% Bonus experience While doing Cooking.
-1 Steps required While doing Cooking.

Uses

This item may be equipped to your character.

Sources

Primary Recipe Output

Craft an iron chef's hat

You reinforce the chef hat into a new taller shape with the ironweed twine to make it stronger and heavier.

Upgrade a chef's hat with some ironweed twine.

Recipe Outputs
Recipe Name Level Service
Requirement 		Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Craft an iron chef's hat Tailoring lvl. 61 Needs Advanced Loom service or better. 1x Chef's hat
2x Ironweed twine
2x Tough linen cloth		 1x Iron chef's hat

Recipe Name Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Minimum
Steps 		Max
Work Efficiency 		Max
XP/Step 		Full Recipe
W.E.A.R.

Rate 		W.E.A.R.
